amethyst-and-selenite.content:
Quick Answer

Quick Answer: Yes, Amethyst and Selenite can be worn together (compatibility: 100/100 — Excellent). Best for sleep & relaxation, protection & grounding, meditation & spiritual growth.

About Amethyst and Selenite

Amethyst

Element: air
Chakras: crown, third-eye
Intentions: calm, protection, spiritual

Amethyst Meaning →

Selenite

Element: air
Chakras: crown, third-eye
Intentions: calm, protection, spiritual, personal-power

Selenite Meaning →

Caring for Amethyst and Selenite

Both stones are genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass. To keep them at their best:

  • Cleansing: Running water for hard stones (Mohs 6+), moonlight for all, smoke (sage/palo santo) for delicate ones.
  • Charging: Place on a Selenite slab or in moonlight overnight. Keep Selenite out of prolonged direct sun if color-sensitive.
  • Storing: Store separately or with a soft cloth between them to prevent scratching.

Complete crystal cleansing guide →

Shop Amethyst + Selenite

Every stone below is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I wear Amethyst and Selenite together every day?

Yes. Amethyst and Selenite are a excellent pairing (score 100/100). Many people wear them daily as a bracelet combination or carry them as pocket stones.

What is Amethyst and Selenite good for together?

This combination is traditionally associated with sleep & relaxation, protection & grounding, meditation & spiritual growth.

Which hand should I wear them on?

There's no strict rule. A common approach: wear the receiving stone (traditionally the calming one) on the left wrist and the projecting stone on the right. Trust what feels right.

How do I cleanse Amethyst and Selenite?

Moonlight works for both. Running water is fine for hard stones (quartz family, Mohs 6+). Selenite slabs clear and charge any stone placed on them. See our complete cleansing guide.

Can I add a third stone?

Yes, but keep your intention clear. Clear Quartz is a safe amplifier that works with almost any combination. Avoid adding stones with conflicting intentions.

Caring for Obsidian and Black Tourmaline

Both stones are genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass. To keep them at their best:

  • Cleansing: Running water for hard stones (Mohs 6+), moonlight for all, smoke (sage/palo santo) for delicate ones.
  • Charging: Place on a Selenite slab or in moonlight overnight. Keep Black Tourmaline out of prolonged direct sun if color-sensitive.
  • Storing: Store separately or with a soft cloth between them to prevent scratching.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I wear Obsidian and Black Tourmaline together every day?

Yes. Obsidian and Black Tourmaline are a excellent pairing (score 100/100). Many people wear them daily as a bracelet combination or carry them as pocket stones.

What is Obsidian and Black Tourmaline good for together?

This combination is traditionally associated with protection & grounding.

Which hand should I wear them on?

There's no strict rule. A common approach: wear the receiving stone (traditionally the calming one) on the left wrist and the projecting stone on the right. Trust what feels right.

How do I cleanse Obsidian and Black Tourmaline?

Moonlight works for both. Running water is fine for hard stones (quartz family, Mohs 6+). Selenite slabs clear and charge any stone placed on them. See our complete cleansing guide.

Can I add a third stone?

Yes, but keep your intention clear. Clear Quartz is a safe amplifier that works with almost any combination. Avoid adding stones with conflicting intentions.
